title: ActvPlatformAdncIdentifier - Metadata API
description: Represents the information about the identifiers to be activated, such as Email, Phone, Mobile Advertiser (MAID) ID, and Over-the-top (OTT) ID.

activationPlatform.description: Reference to the ActivationPlatform metadata type.Reference to ActivationPlatform.

identifierHashMethod.description: The hash method of the identifier type. The supported hash method for Email and Phone is SHA256. The supported hash method for MAID and OTT is NONE.

identifierType.description: The type of identifier to be activated.Valid values are: EMAIL MAID OTT PHONE

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of an ActvPlatformAdncIdentifier component.
